# clickhouse_database (Resource)

Use the *clickhouse_database* resource to create a database in a ClickHouse cloud *service*.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "clickhouse_database" "mydatabase" {
  service_id = xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx
  name = "mydatabase"
  comment = "This is a test database"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the database
- `service_id` (String) ClickHouse Service ID

### Optional

- `comment` (String) Comment associated with the database

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# Database can be imported by specifying the service UUID and the database name, comma separated.
terraform import clickhouse_database.example xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx,mydatabase
```
